name: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc.
business: Comstock is a leading asset manager, developer, and operator of mixed-use and transit-oriented properties in the Washington, D.C. region. It provides a comprehensive suite of real estate services to asset-owning clients, including asset management, property management, development and construction management. Its client base is composed primarily of institutional real estate investors, high net worth family offices, financial institutions, and governmental bodies.

exposures.sentence: As a vertically integrated real estate services company, we perform all property management services through three wholly owned subsidiaries: CHCI Commercial, CHCI Residential, and ParkX Management.
We provide a comprehensive suite of real estate services to our asset-owning clients, including asset management, property management, development and construction management, and more.

catalysts.event: Delivery of 1 commercial asset (approximately 6,000 square feet) and 1 residential asset (419 units, approximately 430,000 square feet)
catalysts.sentence: In addition, we manage the following assets that are under construction and scheduled for delivery in the next 6 to 12 months: 1 commercial asset representing approximately 6,000 square feet; and 1 residential asset with 419 units representing approximately 430,000 square feet;

catalysts.event: Opening of Ebbitt House restaurant at Reston Station
catalysts.sentence: Ebbitt House, the first-ever expansion of D.C.'s iconic Old Ebbitt Grill, which is also scheduled to open in early 2026.

catalysts.event: Full delivery of BLVD Haley luxury residential tower (419 units, 427,000 square feet)
catalysts.sentence: BLVD Haley, a 427,000-square foot luxury residential tower with 419 units that is scheduled to fully deliver in early 2026.
